title: Kottiyoor Temple
tagline: Kottiyoor Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kottiyoor Temple is a prominent Shiva temple in Kottiyoor, Kannur, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Kottiyoor Temple is a prominent Shiva temple in Kottiyoor, Kannur, Kerala, India. Vadakkeshwaram Temple is the common name of the temple from ancient times, but some of the local people address the temple as Ikkare Kottiyoor as it is on the bank of the river close to the Kottiyoor village, to differentiate it from the shrine in the other side of the river. Thruchherumana Kshetram is also another name by which temple is known. The temple is a special category temple under Malabar Devaswom board.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kottiyoor
topPlaces.description: Kottiyoor is a village and gram panchayat in the easterly hills of Kannur district in Kerala state. Kottiyoor is the twenty third wildlife sanctuary of Kerala, located in the hills of Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary is Wildlife Sanctuary located in Eastern Hilly Areas in Kannur district of Kerala, India. Situated near to other sanctuaries in Kerala and Karnataka, the Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary is rich in biodiversity and rich flora and fauna.

topPlaces.name: Aralam Butterfly Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Aralam Butterfly Sanctuary is the northernmost wildlife sanctuary of Kerala, southwest India. It is 55 km2 (21 sq mi) in area and located on the western slope of the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Ambayathode
topPlaces.description: Ambayathode is a hilly village near to Kottiyoor temple in the Kannur district of Kerala, India. Ambayathodu witnessed massive landslides during Kerala Floods 2018.

topPlaces.name: Palchuram
topPlaces.description: Palchuram is a mountain pass located in Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary of Kerala, India across the Western Ghats. Height of Palchuram is 3,000 ft (910 m).

topPlaces.name: Periya, Wayanad
topPlaces.description: Periya is a village located in Wayanad district in Kerala, India. Periya Surrounded by Western Ghats forests, it features lush green tea and coffee estates.

topPlaces.name: Kelakam, India
topPlaces.description: Kelakam is a town and grama panchayat located in the Kannur district of Kerala state, India. Kerala Hill Highway (SH 59) and the proposed Mananthavady Mattanur airport road pass through Kelakam town.

topPlaces.name: Malayampadi
topPlaces.description: Malayampadi is a small village in Kannur District of Kerala, India. The village is located on the slope of the Western Ghats 1302 feet above sea level.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kottiyoor Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kottiyoor Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kottiyoor Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kottiyoor Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kottiyoor Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kottiyoor Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kottiyoor Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kottiyoor Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kottiyoor, Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary, Aralam Butterfly Sanctuary, Ambayathode, Palchuram.
